title: Federal S.1072 - A Bill to Amend the Clean Air Act to Eliminate a Waiver Under that Act
content: The bill was introduced in Senate and had its first reading on March 14. A bill to amend the Clean Air Act to eliminate a waiver under that Act, to eliminate an authorization for States to use new motor vehicle emission and new motor vehicle engine emissions standards identical to standards adopted in California, and for other purposes.
author: Analysts Account
